creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
As stated before in mail conversation with the submitter, please wait with this until after the Christmas holidays in case there is fallout. Sometimes when updating xorg proto ports things in other places break, so this needs proper testing and probably  should be tested in the xorg dev repo for a while first. If building with python is a concern, please use another version for the time being.
 I am also unsure if the patch is actually correct, especially the datadir thing, since datadir usually refers to where the port finds things in the installed system. That change definitely needs to be checked and double checked.
 -- 
 Niclas
 Sent from my mobile device.
 Excuse my brevity.
